title: × terrelymus maltei
intro: × Terrelymus maltei, also known as × Terrelymus maltei, is a hybrid plant species within the rose family (Rosaceae). It is believed to have originated from the cross between Malus baccata (Siberian crab apple) and Sorbus aucuparia (European rowan). The medicinal properties of × Terrelymus maltei include its use as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant agent, which can help alleviate digestive issues and reduce oxidative stress. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to help lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antiseptic properties, which can be achieved through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures.
